'''ngochalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:woeful|woeful]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-ch-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:woeful|woeful]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngochalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngochalithi|ngochalithi]] || [[word:ngochaliji|ngochaliji]] || [[word:ngochalishi|ngochalishi]] || [[word:ngochaliki|ngochaliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngochaluthuthu|ngochaluthuthu]] || [[word:ngochalujuju|ngochalujuju]] || [[word:ngochalushushu|ngochalushushu]] || [[word:ngochalukuku|ngochalukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngochaluthu|ngochaluthu]] || [[word:ngochaluju|ngochaluju]] || [[word:ngochalushu|ngochalushu]] || [[word:ngochaluku|ngochaluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngochalufthuf|ngochalufthuf]] || [[word:ngochalufjuf|ngochalufjuf]] || [[word:ngochalufshuf|ngochalufshuf]] || [[word:ngochalufkuf|ngochalufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngochalethe|ngochalethe]] || [[word:ngochaleje|ngochaleje]] || [[word:ngochaleshe|ngochaleshe]] || [[word:ngochaleke|ngochaleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngochalothotho|ngochalothotho]] || [[word:ngochalojojo|ngochalojojo]] || [[word:ngochaloshosho|ngochaloshosho]] || [[word:ngochalokoko|ngochalokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngochalotho|ngochalotho]] || [[word:ngochalojo|ngochalojo]] || [[word:ngochalosho|ngochalosho]] || [[word:ngochaloko|ngochaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngochalofthof|ngochalofthof]] || [[word:ngochalofjof|ngochalofjof]] || [[word:ngochalofshof|ngochalofshof]] || [[word:ngochalofkof|ngochalofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngochalĂŻfthĂŻf|ngochalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngochalĂŻfjĂŻf|ngochalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngochalĂŻfshĂŻf|ngochalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngochalĂŻfkĂŻf|ngochalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngochalĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|ngochalĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngochalĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|ngochalĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngochalĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|ngochalĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngochalĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|ngochalĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngochalĂŻfthĂŻf|ngochalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngochalĂŻfjĂŻf|ngochalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngochalĂŻfshĂŻf|ngochalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngochalĂŻfkĂŻf|ngochalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngochalĂŻfthĂŻf|ngochalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngochalĂŻfjĂŻf|ngochalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngochalĂŻfshĂŻf|ngochalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngochalĂŻfkĂŻf|ngochalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngochalĂŠthĂŠ|ngochalĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ngochalĂŠjĂŠ|ngochalĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ngochalĂŠshĂŠ|ngochalĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ngochalĂŠkĂŠ|ngochalĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngochalathatha|ngochalathatha]] || [[word:ngochalajaja|ngochalajaja]] || [[word:ngochalashasha|ngochalashasha]] || [[word:ngochalakaka|ngochalakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngochalatha|ngochalatha]] || [[word:ngochalaja|ngochalaja]] || [[word:ngochalasha|ngochalasha]] || [[word:ngochalaka|ngochalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngochalafthaf|ngochalafthaf]] || [[word:ngochalafjaf|ngochalafjaf]] || [[word:ngochalafshaf|ngochalafshaf]] || [[word:ngochalafkaf|ngochalafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngochalasha|ngochalasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngochalshĂ«sha|ngochalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngochalrosha|ngochalrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngochalmusha|ngochalmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngochalyasha|ngochalyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongochalnkshĂ«sha|gongochalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongochalnkrosha|gongochalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongochalnkmusha|gongochalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongochalnkyasha|gongochalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngochachalasha|ngochachalasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngochachalshĂ«sha|ngochachalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngochachalrosha|ngochachalrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngochachalmusha|ngochachalmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngochachalyasha|ngochachalyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongochachalnkshĂ«sha|gongochachalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongochachalnkrosha|gongochachalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongochachalnkmusha|gongochachalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongochachalnkyasha|gongochachalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngechĂŠlasha|ngechĂŠlasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngechĂŠlshĂ«sha|ngechĂŠlshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngechĂŠlrosha|ngechĂŠlrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngechĂŠlmusha|ngechĂŠlmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngechĂŠlyasha|ngechĂŠlyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongechĂŠlnkshĂ«sha|gongechĂŠlnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongechĂŠlnkrosha|gongechĂŠlnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongechĂŠlnkmusha|gongechĂŠlnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongechĂŠlnkyasha|gongechĂŠlnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngochfalasha|ngochfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngochfalshĂ«sha|ngochfalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngochfalrosha|ngochfalrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngochfalmusha|ngochfalmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngochfalyasha|ngochfalyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongochfalnkshĂ«sha|gongochfalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongochfalnkrosha|gongochfalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongochfalnkmusha|gongochfalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongochfalnkyasha|gongochfalnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
